chapter_title.en: On silence Except when Speaking what is Good, Abandonment of what does not concern one, and Slander

text: النضر بن سويد عن القاسم بن سليمان عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: سمعت أبي يقول: من حسن اسلام المرء تركه ما لا يعنيه.

en.shaykh-tahir-ridha-jaffer: 19.Al-Naḍr ibn Suwayd narrated from al-Qāsim ibn Sulaymān, from Abū ʿAbdillāh (a) who said, “I heard my father say, ‘It is from the beauty of a person’s [devotion to] Islam to eschew that which does not concern him.’”
